general_product_name: Schottky diode (SBD) for switching power supplies
cargo_overview: Surface-mount Schottky barrier diode rated 40V/1A, packaged in SOD-123 plastic encapsulation, intended for switching converters in consumer electronics.
classification_basis: Classified under HS 8541.10 as a semiconductor diode per GIR 1 and Note 5 to Chapter 85.

cargo_overview: DDR4 SDRAM 16Gb monolithic die packaged in BGA-96 for server applications.
classification_basis: Classified under HS 8542.32 as a memory integrated circuit per GIR 1 and Note 9(a) to Chapter 85.

cargo_overview: Subsystem of an EUV lithography scanner including reticle stage and optics column, designed exclusively for semiconductor wafer patterning.
classification_basis: Classified under HS 8486.20 as machines for the manufacture of semiconductor devices per Note 9(C) to Chapter 84.

general_product_name: Bare printed circuit board (boundary case, out of scope)
cargo_overview: Multi-layer rigid printed circuit board, 8 layers, FR-4 substrate, with copper traces but no components mounted.
classification_basis: Classified under HS 8534.00 as a printed circuit per GIR 1.

general_product_name: Item missing HS classification — should drop
cargo_overview: Some product where the classification field is blank.
